name: DT Platform — API Availability
description: Percentage of successful (non-error) requests to the DT Platform API. Maps to the easytravel-backend service. Target: 99.5% over 7 days.

name: DT Platform — Latency SLO (p95 < 2s)
description: 95th percentile response time below 2000ms. Ensures adviser portal interactions feel responsive. Evaluated over 24 hours.

name: DT Platform — Infrastructure Availability
description: Host uptime for the DT demo host. Tracked separately from service availability to distinguish platform-level from application-level issues.
